channel.title: Jose Fresco Blog
channel.description: Insights and reflections on building web applications, browser extensions, and automation tools

item.title: JF Notify Launches - Instant Telegram Notifications for Gravity Forms
item.description: JF Notify (formerly Telegram Notifier for Gravity Forms) is now officially launched at jfnotify.com. Get instant Telegram notifications when Gravity Forms entries are submitted.

item.title: Moving JF Website Monitor from Vercel to Self-Hosting - Cost & Control
item.description: How I migrated JF Website Monitor from Vercel to a locally hosted solution to avoid high costs, Prisma DB limits, and cron-job.org dependence, with plans for future VPS deployment.

item.title: SLA Reporting with JF Website Monitor: Comprehensive Uptime Analytics
item.description: Learn how JF Website Monitor helps businesses maintain SLA compliance with detailed uptime reports, PDF exports, and comprehensive monitoring analytics.

item.title: Family Dashboard Evolution: Personality, Cleanup, and CalDAV Mastery
item.description: From v3.7 to v3.26: How humorous weather narratives, 2000+ lines of code removal, and CalDAV mastery transformed a functional dashboard into a delightful application.

item.title: Reddit Post Hider v3.0: Major Refactor for Reliability
item.description: A complete rebuild focused on reliability and performance. Dedicated hide buttons, intelligent post detection, IntersectionObserver optimization, and enhanced subreddit blocking.

item.title: Streamlining Content Curation with 2-Click Blog Saving
item.description: Introducing a Chrome extension that streamlines content curation by saving the current URL to your WordPress blog with just 2 clicks.

item.title: Moving Hosting from Raspberry Pi to GitHub Pages with Gemini AI
item.description: How I migrated my website from a Raspberry Pi Model B to GitHub Pages after AI experiments polluted my Pi. Using Gemini Chat AI instead of Claude Code for guidance.

item.title: JF Website Monitor Launch - Free Website Monitoring with Change Detection
item.description: Announcing the launch of JF Website Monitor - a free website monitoring service with uptime tracking, content change detection, and instant notifications.

item.title: Creating a Shared Family Dashboard
item.description: Building a centralized family dashboard for schedules, weather, and key information with CalDAV calendar integration and various API integrations.

item.title: Why Uptime Monitoring Alone is Not Enough
item.description: Exploring why modern website monitoring needs to go beyond simple uptime checks to include content change detection, performance monitoring, and more.
